productDisplayName: Pond's Gold Radiance Precious Youth Serum
description: Pond's gold radiance Precious Youth Serum which comes in a transparent bottle with a cap with dropper to pump serum, re-energises the lost radiance of ageing skin cells, anti-ageing ingredients with real gold microparticles recaptures the radiance of youth, revitalizes the skin making it more alive, youthful and bright
